options.name: -enable_for_partition
options.description: enable scanReorder for design with partition

options.name: -keepPDPorts
options.description: Maintains hierarchical ports without adding or deleting shifters

options.name: -preferH
options.description: Makes horizontal scan chain connections if possible

options.name: -preferV
options.description: Makes vertical scan chain connections if possible

options.name: -skipMode
options.description: Specifies method for handling buffers and inverters

options.name: -swapEffort
options.description: Specifies effort level for scanReorder different chains swapping

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
